race.comment: DIDDLE DUMPLING (2) smart mare who drifted back further than expected on resumption with a fast finishing fifth over 1200m at Randwick in BM78 grade. Comes to hand quickly and adept in all conditions. Will prove hard to get past from the good gate. BURJ (10) sound again second-up with the 59kg for a handy fourth over 1100m at this track. Grows a leg in the wet and shapes as the main danger. SLINKY (7) deep into the prep and gets her preferred conditions tonight. Demolished a good field over this track and trip in the heavy (8) conditions last campaign and has each way prospects. SACRED ROCKS (1) smart mare who resumes with excellent first-up credentials. Will appreciate the claim and looks ready to go with the two trials.
